description: A logistics planner must create a strategic deployment plan to move a brigade and its equipment from its home base to a theater of operations.

nodes.task_description: Catalog all personnel, vehicles, and equipment to be deployed.

expected_outcome.value: Planner generates a complete and accurate list of all assets for deployment.

nodes.task_description: Determine the optimal mix of transport assets (air, sea, land) to meet the deployment timeline.

expected_outcome.value: Planner allocates the correct number and type of transport assets.

nodes.task_description: Generate a detailed time-phased force and deployment data (TPFDD) plan.

expected_outcome.value: Planner creates a valid TPFDD that sequences the entire deployment.
